options.text:
Before proceeding, ensure you have already created:

✓ Azure OpenAI resource with deployed model
✓ Azure Key Vault
✓ Azure Cache for Redis
✓ Azure Storage Account with Files share
✓ Azure AD App Registration (instructions below)

This deployment connects to your existing resources - it does NOT create them.

SmartLib uses Azure Active Directory to authenticate users. You must create an App Registration in YOUR Azure AD tenant before deployment.

Quick Setup: Azure Portal → Azure Active Directory → App registrations → New registration → Name: 'SmartLib' → Single tenant → Create

After creation: Certificates & secrets → New client secret → Copy the VALUE (not Secret ID)

For detailed step-by-step instructions with screenshots, visit the prerequisites page.

elements.name: tenantId
elements.label: Azure AD Tenant ID
elements.toolTip: Your organization's Azure Active Directory tenant ID (GUID). Find in Azure Portal → Azure Active Directory → Overview → Tenant ID.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid tenant ID GUID (format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)

options.text: How to find: Azure Portal → Azure Active Directory → Overview → Tenant ID (copy the GUID)

elements.name: APP_CLIENT_ID
elements.label: Application (Client) ID
elements.toolTip: The Application (client) ID from your Azure AD App Registration. Find in the app registration's Overview page.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid client ID GUID (format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)

options.text: How to find: Azure Portal → Azure Active Directory → App registrations → Your SmartLib app → Overview → Application (client) ID

elements.name: APP_CLIENT_SECRET
elements.toolTip: The client secret VALUE (not the Secret ID) from your Azure AD App Registration. This is shown ONLY ONCE when you create it.

constraints.validationMessage: Client secret must be at least 8 characters

options.text: How to create: Azure AD → App registrations → Your app → Certificates & secrets → New client secret → Copy VALUE immediately (not Secret ID). You cannot retrieve this later!
IMPORTANT: After deployment, update your Azure AD App Registration's Redirect URI with the actual web app URL from deployment outputs: https://{webapp-name}.azurewebsites.net/auth/callback
